programs.title: The Conners
programs.sub_title: A Kiss Is Just a Kiss
programs.desc: Darlene struggles to decide between David and Ben; Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom; Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral; Jackie avoids her problems by keeping busy with everyone else's.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Harris is forced to confront Darlene about her lifestyle; Jackie involves herself in other people's problems to avoid confronting her own; Becky is overwhelmed by the costs of raising a baby, so her family steps in to help.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon shares a secret about Leonard when the two go on a weekend trip with Penny and Amy; Koothrappali goes all out with pregnancy gifts.
